---
id: icecube-energy-regression-v0
order: 40
title: IceCube Energy Regression Benchmark v0
status: planned
summary: Placeholder dataset record for future IceCube-style neutrino energy-regression benchmarks based on optical-module observations and event-level features.
modality: icecube
version: v0
data_format: IceCube optical-module event records
access:
  type: pending
  url: null
schema_doc: schema.md
example_paths: []
facts:
  - label: Status
    value: Planned
  - label: Modality
    value: IceCube optical-module event records
  - label: Version
    value: v0
  - label: Access
    value: Pending
used_by:
  - icecube-energy-regression
links:
  docs: null
  schema: /documentation/dataset-icecube-energy-regression-v0-schema.html
bibliography: ../../bibliography.bib
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: mathjax
---

## Record status

This planned record covers IceCube-style energy-regression examples for OpenDC tasks. The dataset should define the target energy, event containment assumptions, optical-module features, and uncertainty fields before a leaderboard opens.

## Access

The intended package command is:

```bash
pimm-data save icecube-energy-regression-v0
```

Until the package is released, this command is a stable placeholder for examples and protocol drafts.

## Schema notes

The schema should define optical-module features, timing and charge summaries, reconstructed event fields, target-energy convention, split names, and example loading code.
